{
  "text_content": {
    "headlines": [
      "REINVENT YOURSELF IN 90 DAYS CHEATSHEET",
      "PHASE 1: IDENTITY & MINDSET REWIRING",
      "PHASE 2: EXECUTION & INPUTS",
      "PHASE 3: SUSTAINING THE JOURNEY"
    ],
    "body_text": [
      "THE MIRROR PRINCIPLE: External reality reflects internal identity.",
      "IDENTITY FORMULA: 'I am the type of person that [does difficult thing X]'.",
      "LAW OF GOYA: Get Off Your Ass. Action aligns with belief.",
      "EXTREME OWNERSHIP: Shift to Internal Locus of Control. You are responsible.",
      "REFRAMING RISK & FEAR: Active Risk (new action) vs. Passive Risk (inaction/mediocrity). Discomfort = Growth Signal.",
      "MASTERING DOPAMINE: Avoid 'Cheap Dopamine' (spikes/crashes). Seek 'Real Dopamine' (sustained efforts). Build Habits: Cue -> Routine -> Reward + Affirmation.",
      "GOAL SETTING: FOCUS ON INPUTS. Obsess over volume of work, not the outcome. Detach from results ('Mailbox Strategy').",
      "STOIC SPARRING (Mental Clarity) OUTSIDE CONTROL (Let Go) X Others' actions X Economy X Past INSIDE CONTROL (Action Plan) ✓ My actions ✓ Responses ✓ Daily effort",
      "90-DAY 'XP FARMING' PROTOCOL: Compress years into days. Simple Daily Block: 1. Sleep (Recovery) -> 2. Deep Work (Ruthless focus) -> 3. Health & Exercise -> 4. Everything else.",
      "DEEP WORK RULES: Ruthless elimination of distractions. Create satisfying environment. Fall in love with the process.",
      "PHYSICAL FOUNDATION (Simplicity): Gym (5x/week, progressive overload), Nutrition (80% whole foods, high protein), Sleep (Routine, sometimes 'sleep for the soul').",
      "INTENTIONAL DISCOMFORT: Do one physically hard thing daily to grow willpower.",
      "EMOTIONAL CONTROL & FAILURE: Expect 'Pit of Despair' (lag in results). Don't detach, feel emotions, ask 'Does this serve me?'.",
      "HANDLING 'L's': Reframe as XP -> Feel the emotion -> 'Feel the Power' (Ask for more difficulty to test strength).",
      "CONSISTENCY IS KEY. EMBRACE THE JOURNEY."
    ],
    "visible_urls": [
      "none"
    ],
    "metadata": "none"
  },

The layout is a clean three-column grid on a light gray background with a subtle paper texture. Each column represents a phase with a title and minimalist icons.
